GLOBAL MACRO INDICATORS  (Source: FRED — Federal Reserve)

============================================================

Brent Crude Oil [2026-06-29]
  Current: 71.59 USD/bbl  (+2.04% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher crude → India CAD widens, rupee weakens, oil companies pressured; lower crude → opposite

US Dollar Index (DXY) [2026-06-26]
  Current: 120.89  (-0.14% vs prior)
  India impact: Stronger DXY → FII outflows from India, rupee weakens; weaker DXY → FII inflows rise

Fed Funds Rate [2026-07-01]
  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

CBOE VIX [2026-07-01]
  Current: 16.59  (+0.85% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

US 10Y Treasury Yield [2026-06-01]
  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows

Yield Curve (10Y-2Y) [2026-07-02]
  Current: 0.35 %  (+12.90% vs prior)
  India impact: Negative spread = inverted curve = US recession risk → global risk-off, India hit
